---
title: "Story Telling"
subtitle: "Communicating insights clearly"
---

A good analysis only matters if someone can act on it. This section focuses on visuals, narrative, and stakeholder-ready summaries.

## Focus areas

- Matching chart type to the question (bars, lines, annotations)
- Clear titles, axis labels, and callouts
- Short written takeaways for decision makers
- Reproducible reports with Quarto

## Projects

Storytelling project posts will be added here as I publish personal work.
